decided to give one of my favorite characters a redo. the old versions will stay up, but for this one I really wanted to make him less of a cringe offshoot joke, and more of a fully fleshed out character. I tried to make him the way I see him in my mind, the best I can, to share the idea with all of you. I hope you guys like it.

I'm sorry for the long break. I really don't like botmaking anymore if I'm gonna be honest, it's become a sluggish chore. maybe it's just because the seasonal depression is starting to kick in. take care of yourselves and dink your oiter or whatever.
